name: Landing Page
description: A clean, modern landing page with hero, features, and CTA
prompt: A professional landing page with a hero section, 3 feature cards, a testimonials section, and a call-to-action footer. Use a modern dark theme with a bright accent color. Include smooth scroll, responsive design, and subtle animations.

name: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio site with project gallery
prompt: A personal portfolio website with a hero intro, about me section, project gallery with image cards, skills/tech stack section, and contact form. Modern minimalist design, responsive, with hover effects on project cards.

name: Restaurant / Cafe
description: Restaurant website with menu and reservation info
prompt: A restaurant website with a hero image section, about the restaurant, menu section with categories (appetizers, mains, desserts, drinks) with prices, opening hours, location map placeholder, and a reservation contact section. Warm, inviting design.

name: SaaS Product
description: SaaS product page with pricing tiers
prompt: A SaaS product landing page with a hero explaining the product, feature grid with icons, 3 pricing tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) with feature comparison, FAQ accordion section, and a signup CTA. Clean, professional, tech-forward design.

name: Blog / Journal
description: Simple blog with article list and reading view
prompt: A personal blog with a header, featured post hero, grid of blog post cards with titles, dates, and excerpts, a sidebar with categories and about section. Clean typography-focused design optimized for reading.

name: Link in Bio
description: Simple link-in-bio page for social profiles
prompt: A link-in-bio page with a profile photo placeholder, name, short bio, and a vertical list of link buttons (Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Website, Email). Each link is a styled button. Mobile-first design with a gradient background.

name: Waitlist / Coming Soon
prompt: A coming soon / waitlist page with a bold headline, countdown timer placeholder, product description, email input field with submit button, and social links. Dark dramatic design with a gradient accent.

name: Event Page
description: Event landing page with schedule and registration
prompt: An event landing page with event name, date, and location hero, speaker/lineup cards, event schedule timeline, venue info, and registration CTA button. Modern conference-style design.
